016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.jsonrpc;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Flowable;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Network;
021import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
022import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.TxOutSetInfo;
023import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.jsonrpc.service.TxOutSetService;
024
025import java.net.URI;
026import java.time.Duration;
027
028import static java.lang.System.out;
029
030/**
031 * Sample command-line tool that subscribes to ChainTip and TxOutSetInfo
032 */
033public class TxOutSetWatcherSample {
034    public static void main(String[] args) throws InterruptedException {
035        Network network = BitcoinNetwork.MAINNET;
036        String rpcUser = "bitcoinrpc";
037        String rpcPassword = "pass";
038        URI rpcUri = URI.create("http://localhost:8332");
039        boolean useZmq = true;
040
041        try (   RxBitcoinClient client = new RxBitcoinClient(network, rpcUri, rpcUser, rpcPassword, useZmq);
042                TxOutSetService txOutSetService = new TxOutSetService(client, client.chainTipPublisher()) ) {
043
044            client.connectToServer(Duration.ofMinutes(5)).join();
045            // Subscribe to ChainTips
046            Flowable.fromPublisher(client.chainTipPublisher())
047                    .subscribe(TxOutSetWatcherSample::onChainTip, TxOutSetWatcherSample::onError);
048
049            // Blocking subscribe to TxOutSetInfo
050            Flowable.fromPublisher(txOutSetService.getTxOutSetPublisher())
051                    .blockingSubscribe(TxOutSetWatcherSample::onTxOutSetInfo, TxOutSetWatcherSample::onError);
052
053        }
054    }
055
056    static void onChainTip(ChainTip tip) {
057        out.printf("Chain tip: %s/%s\n", tip.getHeight(), tip.getHash());
058    }
059
060    static void onTxOutSetInfo(TxOutSetInfo info) {
061        out.printf("TxOutSetInfo: %s/%s, utxos: %s, total BTC: %s\n",
062                info.getHeight(),
063                info.getBestBlock(),
064                info.getTxOuts(),
065                info.getTotalAmount().toFriendlyString());
066    }
067
068    static void onError(Throwable t) {
069        out.println("Error: " + t);
070    }
071}
